paragraphs.text: I'm Vaishnavi Singh. I study {Computing and Law|Computing and Law with a double major in Political Science} at SMU, in my final year. I work on AI safety and governance.

On the research side: I'm a {Georgia Tech AISI Technical Fellow|Georgia Tech AISI Technical Fellow, covering RL misspecification, AI control, oversight, and mechanistic interpretability}, and alumna of {OAISI|the Oxford AI Safety Initiative, where I completed the ARENA curriculum and did ML engineering for AI safety research at ARBOx3} and {BASIS Berkeley|the Berkeley AI Safety Student Initiative, where I worked on AI moral status and personhood. That research became a paper accepted to the FAST Workshop at AAAI 2025}.

In industry: I'm at {Confide|Confide Platform, building an AI governance product covering policy generation, evaluation tooling, and incident reporting}, and previously worked in technology risk at {KPMG|KPMG, in technology risk advisory, reviewing AI systems against the EU AI Act, NIST RMF, and related standards}.
